card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: red Peasant 11AVA
card.text: Haste This creature attacks each combat if able.

card.name: Mirdrim Cleave FOE
card.text: Mirdrim Cleave enters tapped unless you pay 3 life. {T}: Add {I}. {3}{I}{I}{I}: Transform this card until end of turn.

card.name: Alira Glade FOE

card.name: colorless Orb 11FOE
card.text: This creature can't block. Whenever this deals combat damage to a player, target player mills two cards.

card.name: Kera, Mordel's New Hope FOE
card.text: Trample At the end of your first postcombat main phase, if Kera, Mordel's New Hope entered the battlefield this turn, untap a creature you control, then after this phase, there's an additional combat phase followed by an additional postcombat main phase.

card.name: Foruden Shrine FOE
card.text: Foruden Shrine enters tapped unless you pay 3 life. {T}: Add {G}. {4}{G}{G}: Transform this card until end of turn.

card.text: Mangreil Precipice enters tapped unless you pay 3 life. {T}: Add {R}. {5}{R}: Transform this card until end of turn.

card.name: Lucillica Dreamscape FOE
card.text: Lucillica Dreamscape enters tapped unless you pay 3 life. {T}: Add {U}. {1}{U}: Transform this card until end of turn.

card.text: This token can be used to represent a token that's a copy of a permanent.

card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.text: *(This creature has one of Spark Hunter Kajiwara's loyalty abilities, except it costs +1 to activate.)*

card.name: Goggles ONI
card.text: Trample, reach Whenever a land you control enters, up to one target creature you control can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less this turn.

card.name: Manifest 2HU
card.text: You can cover a face-down manifested creature with this reminder card. A manifested creature card can be turned face up any time for its mana cost. A face-down card can also be turned face up for its morph cost.

card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.text: *(This card and its name is the creature type chosen as it was created.)*

card.name: Equalised Dragon AKT
card.text: *(Put an equalised card underneath this; this has its abilities, but not card types. This card is single faced and can't be transformed. It has a saga's or planeswalker's abilities but doesn't gain their counters.)*

card.name: Starvation WAS
card.text: Creatures your opponents control have base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Draft Archetypes FOE
card.text: {W}{U}: Flicker {U}{B}: Reanimator {B}{R}: Sacrifice {R}{G}: Landfall {G}{W}: Noncreature Spells {W}{B}: Enchantments {B}{G}: Graveyard Value {G}{U}: Human//Elf Typal {U}{R}: Noncreature Spells *(CardAdv)* {R}{W}: Go Wide {I}{W}: Tokens Go Wide Anthems {I}{U}: Same Name//Tokens {I}{B}: Sacrifice//Go Tall {I}{R}: Multi Luminous {I}{G}: Reflect//Tokens

card.name: Food ANS
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Idol's Blessing ANS
card.text: You may play land cards from your graveyard.

card.name: Illuminated Blue FOE
card.text: If you control four or more blue permanents, you've illuminated blue for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated Green FOE
card.text: If you control four or more green permanents, you've illuminated green for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated Red FOE
card.text: If you control four or more red permanents, you've illuminated red for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated Silver FOE
card.text: If you control four or more silver permanents, you've illuminated silver for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated White FOE
card.text: If you control four or more white permanents, you've illuminated white for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illuminated black FOE
card.text: If you control four or more black permanents, you've illuminated black for the rest of the game.

card.name: Illusion AVA
card.text: Flying When this creature becomes the target of a spell, sacrifice it.

card.name: colorless Insect 11FOE
card.text: Flying, decayed *(This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)*

card.name: colorless Kirin 55HRO
card.text: *(This creature is all colors.)* Trample, lifelink, haste

card.name: Kite ANS
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Luminous in All Colors FOE
card.text: If you control four or more permanents of the same color, you've illuminated that color for the rest of the game.

card.name: MVX DRAFT ARCHETYPES MVX
card.text: {R}{W}{U} ARTIFACTS {R}{W} GO-WIDE Engineer ways to kill your foes fast using your wide array of artifacts! {W}{U} BUILDINGS Develop your buildings to generate value nobody can compete with. {U}{R}{G} SAGAS/REGALE {U}{R} CONTROL Accrue long-term advantage by consistently casting noncreature spells. {R}{G} AGGRO Regale your prowess to your opponent's face by singing and slinging spells! {G}{U}{B} DELIRIUM {G}{U} RAMP Fill your graveyard to help paint more mana into casting powerful spells! {U}{B} TEMPO Use your late-night motivation to empower evasive threats and disrupt your opponent. {B}{G}{W} PREPARATION {B}{G} LIFEGAIN Feast on food with your creatures by paying off lifegain synergies. {G}{W} TOKENS Prepare your opponent a twenty-course meal of plants and pain! {W}{B}{R} EXPLOIT {W}{B} ENTERS Blink and reanimate your actors to give their enters triggers an encore. {B}{R} SACRIFICE The show must go on, even if it means sacrificing a few friends.

card.name: colorless Mongoose 55FOE
card.text: Reach *(This creature can block creatures with flying.)*

card.name: On An Adventure KRK
card.text: After an Adventure resolves, you can place the exiled card here. You may cast the creature from exile.

card.name: On An Adventure KDT
card.text: After an Adventure resolves, you can place the exiled card here. You may cast the creature from exile.

card.name: Opus WAS
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, cast a copy of the exiled card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: colorless Orb Wizard 11FOE
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: colorless Penumbra WAS
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. *(You can cover a face-down permanent with occlude with this reminder card. A card with occlude can be turned face up at any time for its occlude cost.)*

card.name: Pious Farmer (Token) AVA
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, scry 1. Then if you gained 3 or more life, draw a card. Then if you gained 7 or more life, create a token that's a copy of Pious Farmer.

card.name: Recruitment DHW
card.text: *(Recruitment is only conjured by cards and is otherwise illegal)* Create a 1/1 white Solder creature token.

card.name: black Rogue WAS
card.text: When this creature dies, you may play the exiled card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Sanctum Reminder FOE
card.text: Before the game starts, place your sanctum here face down. This is not an ordered deck. You can look at your sanctum at any time. Your sanctum consists of up to seven unique cards that can start from the sanctum. You may sideboard cards in the sanctum as long as your main deck and sanctum meet minimum deck building requirements.

card.name: green and white Satyr Wizard GTP
Seas of Krakonos Limited Archetypes KRK
card.text: {W}{U}: Flicker {U}{B}: Second Card Drawn {B}{R}: Aristocrats *(creature and artifact)* {R}{G}: Adventure Stompy {G}{W}: Tokens *(creature and noncreature)* {W}{B}: Go Wide Aggro {U}{R}: Vehicles {B}{G}: Reanimator {R}{W}: Spellslinger Aggro {G}{U}: Sea Monster Ramp

card.name: Shiroyuki Emblem ANS
card.text: Spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. You may play an additional land card on each of your turns.

card.name: black Skeleton 22ANS
card.text: *(This is a copy of a creature.)*

card.name: black and red Spirit 63TZR
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 3 life unless you sacrifice a creature.

card.name: The Core VRN
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures a player controls attack you and aren't blocked, that player seizes The Core. *(This triggers after blockers are declared.)* Whenever you seize The Core and at the beginning of your upkeep, choose one— • You get {E}. • Surveil 1.

card.name: The Core VRN 2
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures a player controls attack you and aren't blocked, that player seizes The Core. *(This triggers after blockers are declared.)* Whenever you seize The Core and at the beginning of your upkeep, choose one— • You get {E}. • Surveil 1.

card.name: Treasure VRN
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Treasure DHW
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Vryn Draft Archetypes VRN
card.text: {W}{U} SEIZE THE CORE Seize Vryn itself. Gain a steady stream of energy. And play tempo cards to level the playing field. {B}{U} COVERT CONSORTIUM Hit your opponents with sneaky creatures to uncover your opponents doom. {B}{R} VEHICLE MAVERICKS Run over your opponent with Vehicles and use crewing creatures as cannon fodder. {R}{G} ENERGIZED KICKER Accumulate energy and spend it to kick your spells into overdrive. {G}{W} TEACH ABILITIES Modify your creatures with ability counters. Attack with big creatures. {W}{B} PHYREXIAN ENTER THE BATTLEFIELD Reanimate and flicker your creatures to bury your opponent under a pile of value. {U}{R} WIZARDS FROM EXILE Rebound is back. Combine it with impulse effects and other cast from exile synergies to show your spellcasting domination. {G}{B} LEAVE THE GRAVE Make your cards leave the graveyard and get reward for it. {R}{W} INSPIRED GEARS Attack your opponent with inspired creatures and double up on your value by cracking some gears. {U}{G} ENGROSS FLASH Cast versatile spells during your opponents turn and disrupt them with counter-magic and spells with flash.

card.name: blue and black Human Warlock 11SHS
card.text: Brainwash *(If this creature would die, choose an opponent to gain control of it instead and it loses brainwash.)*

card.name: colorless Wurm Dragon 34FOE
card.text: *(This is also a Kindred permanent.)* This is also a creature if you've illuminated silver.
